text: The quiet hum of ideas conversed between glass and steel feels simultaneously enclosed and expansive. In the first room, I sense anticipation—the way thought swells between participants in the sterile meeting space, set apart by transparent walls from the open corridor. Moving toward the vibrant R+D display, there is a shift: a playfulness in color and typography, a celebration of intellectual possibility. Uncertainty hovers, softened by hope—here, surrounded by the artifacts and declarations of research, my mind wavers between the known and the vast, inviting unknown. I feel contemplative yet oddly buoyed, as if every surface invites me to participate in ongoing acts of creation.
